programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga's Parrot/Chocolate Turtles
programme.desc: Helga's Parrot: Big Bob gets a pesky parrot he passes to Helga, who confides in it about Arnold. Chocolate Turtles: Arnold and Gerald sell chocolate turtles to fund their go-cart project.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Love and Cheese/Weighing Harold
programme.desc: Love and Cheese: Arnold goes all out to win Lila's affection by taking her to the Annual Cheese Festival. Weighing Harold: Harold feels that he has gotten too fat, so he gets his parents to send him on a weight-off cruise.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: It Girl/Deconstructing Arnold
programme.desc: It Girl: Helga becomes the latest child fashion star and everyone loves her for her scowl and bad attitude. Deconstructing Arnold: The gang finally gets sick of Arnold's never-ending good advice, so they all decide to stop listening to him all together.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Grudge Match/Polishing Rhonda
programme.desc: Grudge Match: Arnold and Grandpa vs Helga and Big Bob in a fender bender blame game. Polishing Rhonda: Rhonda and Patty's rivalry heats up at finishing school.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Back to School/Egg Story
programme.desc: Back To School: Grandpa returns to grade school so he can finally fulfill his dream of graduating. Egg Story: Mr. Simmons gives the class an assignment to couple up and take care of an egg over the weekend to learn teamwork and responsibility.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Weird Cousin/Baby Oskar
programme.desc: Weird Cousin: Arnold's weird cousin, Arnie, arrives for a visit and appears to be the biggest loser to everyone except Lila, the love of Arnold's life. Baby Oskar: Oskar's wife Susie agrees to watch her cousin's baby, also named Oskar.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga Sleepwalks/Fighting Families
programme.desc: Helga Sleepwalks: Helga begins to sleepwalk and ends up walking to Arnold's house. Fighting Families: The Fighting Families Contest has come to town and have selected two families: one from PS 118 and PS 119.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Monkeyman!/Buses, Bikes, Subways
programme.desc: Monkeyman!: Arnold is saved from thugs by a mysterious, caped character named Monkeyman. Buses, Bikes, Subways: Out on a field trip, Harold and Helga miss the bus and get separated from the rest of the class.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Grandpa's Sister/Synchronized Swimming
programme.desc: Grandpa's sister: Mitzi arrives unexpectedly at the boarding house. Synchronized Swimming: Coach Wittenberg recruits Arnold's gang for a synchronized swim team.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga's Masquerade/Mr. Green Runs
programme.desc: Helga's Masquerade: When Helga realizes that Arnold is so taken by Lila because of her wit and charm, she decides that the only way to get Arnold to notice her is to be like Lila. Mr. Green Runs: Arnold helps Mr. Green run for the City Council.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga On The Couch
programme.desc: Helga is recommended for counseling after Mr. Simmons observes her berating Arnold, arguing with her parents, etc. She learns that unrequited love is very normal and that she's actually okay.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Dino Checks Out
programme.desc: Washed up balladeer Dino Spumoni fakes his own death in order to increase his record sales. Everyone believes he's dead and at the funeral, Grandpa and Arnold find out that Dino has left Arnold all his future record sales.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Summer Love
programme.desc: By complete coincidence, Arnold and Helga and family end up at the same beach resort for summer vacation. Helga is ecstatic until Arnold meets Summer, the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: After a chilling vampire movie, Sid is so spooked that he believes that Stinky has all of the characteristics of a vampire. Olga comes home and wants to be a big sister to a little girl.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Gerald becomes addicted to a game called "The King." When Arnold notices that Gerald is avoiding him and making excuses regarding his whereabouts, he becomes suspicious. Arnold, Sid, Gerald, and Harold go on a fishing trip.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: The guys find a bag of money and they want to split it up right away. But Arnold strongly suggests the honest route "to turn the money into the police and keep it if no one claims it."

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: When a new bully comes on the block, Wolfgang feels threatened that he will lose his power over Arnold and the gang. Phoebe breaks her leg when she rescues Helga from the pathway of a speeding bus.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold tries to help Eugene get out of a tree but gets stuck himself. After a busy day at school of boasting and fashion policing, Rhonda comes home and finds out that they are now broke and have nothing left.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Helga loses her infamous locket and it winds up in the wrong place in Arnold's house. Sid learns that germs are on just about everything people touch and becomes so psychotic about hygiene that he wears a protective suit.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: During a game of baseball, Arnold pops a fly ball and it hits Helga in the head. The knock on the head makes her goofy and causes amnesia. Grandpa is paid a visit by his old friend Jimmy, which sparks up his competitive nature.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: As the gang passes through the cemetery, Gerald tells the story of the Ghost Bride who murdered her husband-to-be when he left her at the alter and married her sister. Gerald meets Chloe, a cute girl on his block, and instantly falls head over heels.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Harold decides that he hates school and wants nothing else to do with it. But when he gets suspended and can find nothing to do at home, he tries everything he can to go back. Ernie falls in love with a beautiful magazine model.

programme.desc: Arnold pays his cousin Arnie a visit and it turns out to be much like being in The Twilight Zone. Wolfgang tells Chocolate Boy that if he can go two weeks without chocolate, he'll give him ten pounds of chocolate.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Indiana's Wabash Valley Correctional Facility is an isolated fortress with three officers for every 200 inmates; some inmates find themselves in racial conflict, while others seek conflict elsewhere.

programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa: Extended Stay
programme.desc: An inmate takes drastic action and leaves his cell in a bloody mess; dangerous contraband is found on another inmate at Florida's Santa Rosa Correctional Institution.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: As the oldest prison in California, San Quentin is steeped in a violent history, so it has a set of regulations and procedures to maintain order; inmates often operate under a different code of conduct; gangs control "prison politics."

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Boredom reigns supreme for prisoners who spend endless hours, days and months confined to their cells; some have devised creative ways to pass the time; one inmate is creating a wall mural, but not with real art supplies.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: San Quentin's warden says that other than an inmate's release date, visits are the most important things in their lives; for some, visits are rare moments of intimacy; for others, they are business transaction opportunities.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Inside San Quentin, gangs, drugs and sheer boredom make up a violent mix; Scanvinski Hymes has been in prison since he was 18 years old; almost 20 years later, he's racked up the highest number of violent offenses in California prison history.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: San Quentin has one of the longest histories of violence; whether it's an inmate fresh off the street, a gang dropout in protective custody, or an officer trying to maintain order, they've all fallen victim to violent attacks.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: At San Quentin, every inmate is marked with a security level based on his crime and prison behavior; serving as a reception center, the overpopulated prison must house a dangerous mix of levels within close proximity of one another.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The vast majority of inmates live in two-man cells but even with careful screening, conflicts can still arise between cell mates; one inmate covers up his own beating, and plucked from death row, another inmate tries to make a difference.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash: Extended Stay
programme.desc: With over 2,000 inmates, the Wabash Valley Correctional Facility has a larger population and more acreage than the small town in which it's located; after a decade in confinement, one of Indiana's most infamous inmates moves to general population.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The killer of a corrections officer fights to be freed from 16 years of solitary confinement, and boyhood friends struggle to parent their kids from behind prison walls; but one, cut-off from visits with his son, is on a razor's edge.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram finds a huge haul of famous pottery while Irita Marriott gets her hands on something that brings back happy childhood memories. Plus a visit to the Devon Sculpture Park and the delights of a Devonshire cream tea.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram pins his hopes on a risky item that may or may not be highly collectable. Irita Marriott finds a painting that contains a hidden secret. Along the way there's some sightseeing, kite flying and, of course, pirate impressions.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Tim Medhurst and Margie Cooper set off for Cumbria in a 1970s campervan, looking for antiques. Tim picks up a Scots Guards picture and rare Scottish jug, while Margie chooses a silver locket and bracelet. Plus a visit to a Roman fort.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In the Lake District, Margie buys a French carriage clock, a Chinese pepperette and a candlestick from Derbyshire. Tim falls for the image of a Victorian woman, though his Victorian horse toy might make for a bumpy ride at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the Isle of Man, Tim Medhurst picks up a captain's chair, a pair of bears and a bronze sculpture of a footballer. Margie Cooper buys an antique corkscrew, a cocktail shaker and a bygone sewing machine complete with all its accessories.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Tim Medhurst finds a harvest jug, a pipe holder and gilt bar brooch. Margie Cooper buys a push-along donkey, a doggy nutcracker and prancing leather horse, but it's a ride on the ghost train that has her rather spooked.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On their last outing in the campervan, Tim splurges on an old children's toy and finds a Welsh folk art quill stand. Margie Cooper falls in love with a bulldog gong and is convinced this rare piece of Victoriana will attract high bids.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine and a new Road Tripper, Mark Hill, are on the hunt for collectibles around Scotland. Mark buys 1940s ceramics, a ship in a dome and a 1920s French fountain pen while Roo finds some trench art and a piece of Japanese cloisonne.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine falls in love with a set of Art Deco-style silver butter knives and gambles on a little penny bank. Mark Hill springs for an Edwardian writing table in incredible condition and is excited about a rare piece of studio glass.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In the Scottish Highlands, rookie Road Tripper Mark Hill finds a wooden sculpture of a naked torso, while Roo Irvine picks out silver antiques in almost every shop.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine and Mark Hill are as far north on the mainland as they can get! The finds in the Highlands have been great, including some smart whisky glasses and a rare 1950s Bakelite television. Plus, Roo learns about iconic John O'Groats.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine purchases a bonbon dish and a pretty Victorian brooch, and Mark Hill goes for glass – he buys a few colorful items, but his gamble on a microscope could be an expensive mistake. Plus a visit to Loch Katrine.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: South Wales hosts James Braxton and Izzie Balmer and their 1970s two-seater sports car. Izzie buys a monkey-shaped perfume bottle and an obscure medical curio. James can't resist a bamboo table and a pair of sphinx mounts at a great price.

programme.desc: Janae's inability to shake her insecurities keeps her in the other girls' crosshairs; Shannon's house prank backfires.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Atlanta
programme.desc: Nikki fears she is the next house target after watching the other girls bully Janae; Stephanie finds out her new fling Andre has been hiding a big secret from her.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Atlanta
programme.desc: Nikki is forced to choose whether to go home or to fight for her place in the Bad Girls Club; Shannon questions her feelings for an old flame after his shocking behavior during his visit.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Atlanta
programme.desc: New girl Rocky immediately flips the house upside down with her instigating ways; Shannon's shady house guest leaves a storm of controversy in his wake.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Atlanta

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Atlanta

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Atlanta
programme.desc: Shannon decides to stand up for herself; the girls take part in a wild photo shoot.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After a series of devastating losses, Jon must help an owner and her staff get back on track from their personal tragedies as well as a global pandemic.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer must save an ambitious but rookie family-run brewery that was forced to open during the pandemic.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In his hometown of Las Vegas, Jon rescues a beloved party bar that blames their downfall on the pandemic until Jon discovers the truth.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: For his 200th rescue, Jon rescues a family who bought a Mexican restaurant at the height of the pandemic and put their daughter's future on the line to chase the bright lights of Vegas.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon attempts to rescue a bar in Maricopa, Arizona whose owner has squandered a half a million dollar investment from his parents.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In a Bar Rescue first, Jon helps a failing strip club saddled with a disinterested staff, a skeevy vibe, and an off-putting name: Chix on Dix.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The owners of Marley's on the Beach may lose their business and their marriage if Jon can't reverse the financial strain put on them by the failings of their bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A failing beachfront bar is shut down after rodents invade the kitchen, and Jon is brought to tears by what the owners have endured.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon travels to Oakland, California, to help Marshawn Lynch turn around his bar, Rob Ben's, by teaching the NFL star to treat his staff less like family and more like a team.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Chefs and best friends Christ and Mitch decided to open The Hammer in Las Vegas to cater to locals, but then a case of pneumonia caused everything to fall apart.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In a struggling military bar, a distrustful owner spends her time spying on her staff instead of watching the bottom line.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to a tiny bar in China Grove, Texas, to help a couple on the verge of retirement stop enabling their belligerent daughter.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Feuding bikini-clad bartenders wreak havoc on a California sports bar where the owner is more focused on partying than running a business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The obnoxious behavior of two feuding brothers threatens to put an end to the storied legacy of Royal Oaks, the oldest bar and barbecue joint in Youngstown, Ohio.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to London with a stacked card featuring a showdown between top welterweights Paul “Semtex” Daley and Rory MacDonald, along with appearanc-es from Michael “MVP” Page, Cheick Kongo, Baby Slice and Liam McGeary.

programme.title: Bellator NYC: Sonnen vs Silva
programme.desc: Bellator MMA invades Madison Square Garden in NY with a blockbuster card. Chael Sonnen and Wanderlei Silva in a long-awaited grudge match. The double main event also sees Fedor Emelianenko taking on Matt Mitrione. Also, Douglas Lima and Michael Chandler!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is live with its biggest show ever from Madison Square Garden featuring new signee Ryan Bader taking on Champ Phil Davis for the Light Heavyweight belt. Irish phenom James Gallagher taking on KO artist Chinzo Machida.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes place in Thackerville, Oklahoma with a rubber match between two veteran standouts as Brandon Girtz meets Derek Campos in a main event sure to produce fireworks! The stacked card also features fights with Joe Warren and Kendall Grove.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is from Verona, New York with a Middleweight showdown as Chidi Njokuani takes on former champ Andrey Koreshkov. Heavy-handed Brennan Ward will face off against Fernando Gonzalez in the co-main slot.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes home to San Jose, California with a collision between top lightweights as Patricky Pitbull meets Benson Henderson. Plus the Bellator debut of Roy “Big Country” Nelson when he faces hard-hitting Javy Ayala in a heavyweight battle.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville as Eduardo Dantas puts his Bantamweight world title on the line against Darrion Caldwell. This stacked fight card also features Daniel Straus taking on Emmanuel Sanchez and Pat Curran facing off against John Macapa.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: The elite two-division threat, Gegard Mousasi makes his Bellator debut against former Middleweight Champion Alexander Shlemenko who is on a five-fight win streak.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Penn State as accomplished alumni Phil Davis and Ed Ruth return to their roots. Light Heavyweight Champ Ryan Bader defends his belt. Plus Ilima-Lei Macfarlane and Emily Ducote clash for the inaugural flyweight world title!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Dublin as Irish fan-favorite Brian Moore meets undefeated rising sensation, AJ McKee. Baby Slice returns to the cage, and Conor McGregor’s training partner Charlie Ward battles John Redmond in a fight sure to provide fireworks!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In-laws can be the kind who give unwanted advice, stop by unexpectedly and use guilt and manipulation to get what they want. But sometimes, they are loving parents who get caught in the middle of their child's relationship.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Some teens are catty, mean & spread lies, but what happens when gossip goes too far? Dr. Phil shares a personal story confronting gossip about himself. He then speaks with teen girls who are tangled in a web of gossip that changed their lives forever.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: We've all heard the saying, "Don't get mad, get even," but after watching this show, you may think twice before seeking vindication! You won't believe the twists and turns in this story of revenge with Deoborah and Todd! Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Could you be raising a spoiled brat? Dr. Phil, along with Betsy Brown Braun, author of You're Not the Boss of Me, shows you how to tame your child's meltdowns. First up, Vanesa and Xavier say they can't handle their 4-year-old son Noah and his tantrums.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A New Year can bring a new and improved you. Dr. Phil's guests say it's their loved ones who are the ones who need changing. It's been 10 years since Marcia has been on a date, and her daughter says it's time for her mom to get back in the game.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents say their children have gone from innocent adolescents to racy tweens. First up, 13-year-old Allison's parents describe her as a "boy magnet" who they fear is too young to understand the consequences of grown-up clothing & behavior.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In her first nationally-televised interview, Angelique, 20, breaks her silence about a sinister plot she says she thwarted that almost claimed her life -- and that of her unborn baby.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Husband James says he's fighting for custody of his four children alleging his estranged wife, Jennifer, is controlled by a religious group. Jennifer developed an attachment to the ministry's leader, Doug Perry, of The Fellowship of the Martryrs (FOTM).

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Renee's husband, Kirby, made headlines after she videotaped him spanking her with a wooden spoon. What made Renee decide to record it and turn Kirby in to police? Is there any chance of saving this marriage? Plus, updates on some memorable former guests!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2008, Julia was a single mom, homeless, & living in a car with daughters, Olivia, 15, Phoebe,12, & Olivia's newborn daughter. Her children entered foster care. Olivia's baby was adopted. This family seeks Dr. Phil's advice on reversing adoption. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Best known for his dramatic weight loss, the former Subway pitchman was outed for sexual misconduct. Now, audio tapes detail Fogle's troubling conversations about children, sex and possibly using a child's party to lure victims.Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Danielle & Brandon are in a custody war over their little daughter. Mom Danielle has visitation, & says her ex has threatened to kill her twice. Dad Brandon says Danielle is a terrible mother concerned with her 'nonexistent' acting/singing career. Pt. 1

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dad’s admitted to shoplifting, drugging, now he’s moved in his mistress & Mom sleeps on the couch!

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What happened to 18-yo Ebby Steppach? In the hours before she disappeared, did she leave behind any clues?

programme.desc: Jethro leaves home when he learns his ugly childhood sweetheart is coming for a visit, not knowing she has become a beauty contest winner.

programme.desc: Dick Bremerkamp, a penniless actor, learns the Clampetts are millionaires and begins romancing Elly May.

programme.desc: A fortune-hunting young man decides to amrry into the hillbilly family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett is told by a representative of an oil company that the swamp behind his shack is full of oil.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts begin to settle in their new home in Beverly Hills, California.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: While Granny boils pool water for washing due to the "lack of a pump" and Elly May gets a feminine make-over by Miss Hathaway, cousin Pearl is back at the cabin making eyes with the visiting oil man while he gives her a ride to the nearest phone.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale panics when Mrs. Drysdale comes back from Boston early because she'll meet the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to go home because folks are so unfriendly no one has come to call.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks Jed into taking in his butler and upstairs girl in a plan to civilize the Clampetts, but they don't quite understand the idea of servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed, Ellie May, Jethro, and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts pack up to return to Beverly Hills, so Jethrine tries to pack Jazzbo Depew. Elly says goodbye to her animals

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of the cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdale's dog.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank's longtime friend Lenny reveals to him that an upcoming exposé will air some of the NYPD's dirty laundry. Also, Erin must decide how to charge a doctor whose experimental treatments led to the death of his terminally ill daughter.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After an incident where Officer Witten's (Lauren Patten) backup physically could not keep up with a chase, Frank must decide whether to implement a more rigorous fitness test for the NYPD.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After someone breaks into Luis Delgado's (Lou Diamond Phillips) home and kills his wife, Luis and Danny team up to take down the vicious murderer who may also be responsible for Linda's death.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin must convince Frank to back a new state police bill as part of a bargain she made with Governor Mendez (David Zayas). Also, Danny and Baez pursue the same perp twice after the DA's office is unconvinced by their initial lineup.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: DNA evidence in a murder case leads Danny and Baez to identical twins with identical alibis. Also, Frank learns Nicky is interviewing for a job at the Justice Coalition, which he rarely sees eye-to-eye with.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: As Jamie and Eddie's wedding day approaches, Frank worries about the toast he'll deliver at their rehearsal dinner. Also, Erin interviews a witness whose story leads her to doubt Eddie's honesty.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez grapple with a year-old homicide investigation brought to their attention by Maggie (Callie Thorne), the medium who previously helped them solve a case.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank and Erin are at odds when Frank learns the D.A.'s office keeps a list of NYPD cops they consider "unreliable." Also, Danny and Baez recruit retired mobster Vincent Rella (Dan Hedaya) to assist in an investigation.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank's esteem for an old friend and late socialite proves to be a mistake when her son threatens to publicly reveal who she really was.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank takes one of Jamie's cases to heart when it involves the suspicious death of his friend's, FBI Agent Wilson Ortega's (Emiliano Diez), terminally ill wife.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank works to vindicate Detective Douglas McKenzie (Mike Carlsen), a detective accused of using excessive force. Also, Danny and Baez track down the killer responsible for the death of a rapper's bodyguard.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando un famoso jugador de baloncesto aparece muerto por una aparente sobredosis, Danny investiga sus posibles vínculos con una banda local de drogas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El caso se vuelve personal para Danny cuando trabaja para proteger a la enfermera Faith Madson (Jessie Mueller) de su violento exnovio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de una serie de estrangulamientos en Boston, la UAC busca un sospechoso al que le guste guardar recuerdos de las víctimas, y el equipo se pregunta si un vínculo común con las víctimas podría llevarlos al culpable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los adolescentes que fueron reportados como desaparecidos son sospechosos de una serie de asesinatos en masa en Chicago, el UAC investiga su paradero para encontrar el motivo de los crímenes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran esqueletos en el patio trasero de una casa de Virginia, la UAC enfoca su investigación en la familia que vive allí, desenterrando secretos familiares arraigados en las pasadas divisiones raciales en el Sur.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un joven desaparece de su casa en St. Louis, la UAC vuelve a investigar un caso similar sin resolver en busca del sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando Ducky y Abby confirman que han identificado los restos de al menos cinco personas, el equipo de NCIS comienza inmediatamente a notificar a sus familias, con la intención de encontrar una conexión entre la azarosa selección de víctimas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga cuando un Marine que aparentaba haber muerto congelado despierta en la mesa de autopsia de Ducky.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo investigan cuando una llamada en el fin de semana resulta en la muerte de dos agentes del NCIS. El equipo descubre que la información obtenida sobre actividad terrorista era una trampa para asesinarlos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo investigan cuando el libro de Mcgee sobre un agente de la NCIS se convierte en realidad. McGee se horroriza cuando un contramaestre en el que basó al personaje de su libro es asesinado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El caso se vuelve personal para Danny cuando trabaja para proteger a la enfermera Faith Madson (Jessie Mueller) de su violento exnovio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El juicio de Eddie se ve nublado por su pasado cuando arresta a un conocido detestable de la universidad bajo cargos cuestionables.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se unen a una fuerza de tarea antidrogas para rastrear a un proveedor de drogas. Baez entra en contacto con las sustancias y pronto lucha por su vida debido a una sobredosis accidental.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Erin está conflictuada cuando Jamie y Eddie le piden que elimine los cargos antiguos contra Parker Mack (Spencer House), un hombre que valientemente rescató a una mujer de una situación de rehenes.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle. Recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time. A neighborhood man gives motorists a scare.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A biker with a history of stealing vehicles doesn’t know how to drive his motorcycle. A man in- between jobs takes up a sketchy method of earning money. Deputies strongly question the legitimacy of a man’s work van.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A business owner flags down officers when an erratic man starts climbing on his car. Unusual circumstances allow officers to cut a driver some slack for being honest. A man forgets to return a car after running errands.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on the run makes a dangerous decision when he finds himself cornered. An unsuspecting driver gets more than she bargained for when she gives an old friend a lift. A friendly woman has a thing for cowboys.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teenager who ran away from home tries running from the cops too. A man set a date to turn his life around, but deputies ask him to start earlier. A man found with hundreds of sunglasses claims he was going to give them away.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to put an end to a dangerous stolen vehicle pursuit. An alleged mechanic says he has permission to drive a semi-truck — the owner says otherwise. A couple stops a woman from driving away in their car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When the cuffs come out, an emotional cyclist gives deputies the runaround. A boyfriend’s honesty saves his girlfriend from going to jail on her birthday. Police investigate a case of road rage involving a possible gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway cyclist dips into a house to catch his breath. A deputy tries to cut a man some slack despite his mistakes. The owners of an empty house call the police when they hear someone else inside.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pair of suspects on the run pretend they were busy napping. A man reaches for something in his pocket, but denies knowing what it is. A family calls the police after their roommate brandishes a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to cut a guy some slack after his relationship troubles got out of hand. A teenager gets a serious lesson in not drinking while underage. A couple is forced to take a raincheck on their wedding day.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a traffic stop, a driver drops off his passenger before speeding away. Deputies are amazed when a man offers them an ID that looks nothing like him. Deputies investigate a case of road rage involving a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with multiple felony warrants gets one last taste of freedom before heading to prison. A speeding driver is arrested for the same thing he was arrested for the day before. A runaway suspect leaves a trail behind him.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A very cooperative car thief tells deputies all about his good fortune. An argument over business leaves one man on the ground with a bloody mouth. The occupants of a truck are oblivious to what deputies find in the backseat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist allegedly mistakes a deputy for a thief and tries to escape into the bushes. Police cut a dad some slack by not towing the family car. Two sisters catch the police’s attention when they take their spat to the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An elderly driver sacrifices his own van during his desperate escape attempt. A traffic stop on a suspended driver turns up more than anticipated. Several car occupants learn it’s better to tell the truth from the start.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A family gets a huge scare when a fleeing suspect finds his way into their house. Police sort out a chaotic argument between two childhood friends. A woman in a suspicious vehicle plays fast and loose with the truth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The owner of a stolen truck calls officers when he spots it in a nearby alley. A fleeing driver leads officers on a wild chase over a closed bridge. Police track down a suspect who gave a liquor store employee a phony $100 bill.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A father-to-be kicks off a dangerous vehicle pursuit over something trivial. A car that ducked out of a DUI checkpoint attracts attention. Officers respond to a disturbance caused by a local man’s erratic behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies catch up to a group of teenagers enjoying a night of joyriding. A traffic stop opens the doors to recovery for a very repentant suspect. A suspect insists his car is not stolen because he did his online research.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Recovery of a stolen vehicle uncovers a weapon and a lengthy criminal history. Detectives cross paths with a car that was stolen in a carjacking. Officers speak with a man who has questionable standards regarding gun safety.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man and woman are pulled over while out on a candy run. A simple traffic violation turns into a multi-vehicle police pursuit. Deputies are notified of a stolen car and find the driver in possession of an interesting tool.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distinctive tattoo reveals a wanted felon’s true identity. Deputies talk to a young woman who traded one bad habit for another. A man in possession of a stolen vehicle tells officers how his day went from bad to worse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man receives an enormous break due to public health concerns. Officers are doubtful when two friends claim they were unaware of each other’s actions. Police pull over a car full of people who know very little about themselves.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase involves tire spikes, shredded rubber, and crashed gates. Suspects accused of burglary state they only steal to pay rent. A traffic stop proves there’s always more than meets the eye.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to outrun the law by bicycle but can’t out pedal police. A deputy goes undercover to investigate stolen baseballs. A K-9 discovers hidden contraband on a suspect’s most private places.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seatbelt violation ends in a chase to the confusion of all involved. A suspect with a history of grand theft auto is found in another stolen car. Officers find drugs in a tough part of town.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A high profile murder trial is thrown into a tailspin when two siblings confess to the same crime.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Science collides with the occult when the team investigates the case of a psychic who predicted her own murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs enter the world of rap music in order to investigate the deaths of three teenagers killed while working for rival rappers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Solving the case of a wealthy defense attorney killed at her son's wedding is compromised when all of the evidence is stolen along with Nick's car.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The evidence in the case of a high-stakes gambler and ladies man murdered outside a casino after a night of revelry proves that appearances can be deceiving.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering his wife and co-workers leads the CSIs on a wild chase through a busy Vegas casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team rallies around one of their own, who is shot in the line of duty and may not survive on the sixth season finale.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While Grissom leads a group of college students on a tour of CSI, the dead speak while the CSIs investigate, each narrating their own case

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate first-hand the behind-the-scenes action of Cirque du Soleil in order to determine what may have contributed to a young dancer's untimely death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is fascinated when every detail of a miniature is identical to that of a real crime scene, and he goes about trying to solve the case using the clues provided.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When an innocent man is brutally attacked and beaten to death by what looks like a monster in a black cape, the CSIs are called to investigate, only to learn that a similar attack took place minutes later.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a dead woman is found hanging from a cross inside a church, the team follows the evidence to uncover a bizarre love triangle dating all the way back to the victim's high school days.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When two young boys are reported missing, a known neighborhood sex offender is the primary suspect.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While investigating an elderly woman's murder, Grissom receives a miniature crime scene replica; Greg attends a hearing to ascertain his culpability in a teenager's accidental death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Catherine y Keppler comienzan a investigar el asesinato de una desconocida adolescente, ambos coinciden en que el asesino, que fue meticuloso a la hora de eliminar pruebas del cadáver y sus alrededores, es probablemente reincidente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un caso relacionado con el cadáver calcinado de un hombre cuyos huesos y tejidos habían sido extraídos lleva a Nick y Keppler al inquietante mundo de la venta ilegal de partes de cuerpos humanos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom regresa de su año sabático como profesor mientras el nuevo miembro del equipo Michael Keppler intenta desesperadamente mantener su oscuro pasado oculto a sus colegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Con potencialmente menos de un día para intentar evitar los próximos asesinatos, el equipo de CSI debe sacudirse rápidamente la sorpresa de que el verdadero asesino en miniatura no es el difunto Ernie Edward Dell.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La ocurrencia de Grissom de que dos jóvenes amantes desaparecidos pueden haber huido a México queda pronto anulada por el descubrimiento de gotas de sangre junto a la plaza de aparcamiento libre del chico en el instituto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras procesa la casa donde fueron asesinadas varias coristas, Sara se ve atormentada por los ojos aterrorizados y las crípticas palabras moribundas de la sexta víctima que descubre.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg se ve obligado a enfrentarse de nuevo a la hostil madre y al hermano del matón al que mató en defensa propia hace varios meses cuando el equipo de CSI descubre que el hermano está implicado en un nuevo caso de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras Grissom y el resto de los CSI están fuera investigando nuevos casos, Hodges hace creer a Archie, Henry, Mandy y Wendy que Grissom quiere que se unan en secreto esa noche para intentar resolver los cuatro casos de asesinos en miniatura.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En su intento por identificar al asesino de un ex boxeador que vivía entre un grupo de prostitutas que lo detestaban, los CSI deben establecer cuál de los varios actos que pusieron en peligro su vida en una noche realmente lo mató.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de una crupier de blackjack cuyo marido, separado de ella, tiene vínculos con un club de creyentes en los ovnis.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A Sara le inquieta que Grissom se reúna con Lady Heather durante la investigación de los CSI sobre su intento de asesinato por parte de un cliente al que se niega a nombrar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo de CSI se acerca más que nunca a la identificación del asesino en miniatura, Sara desaparece misteriosamente, lo que obliga a sacar a la luz su relación con Grissom.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El destino de Sara sigue siendo una incógnita mientras el equipo de CSI se apresura a averiguar si ha sobrevivido al ataque del asesino en miniatura, en el estreno de la octava temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga dos casos inusuales. La muerte de un conductor de go-carts cuyo cuerpo decapitado se encuentra a metros de la carretera por la que corría, y el misterioso asesinato en un restaurante donde los clientes cenan en la oscuridad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A woman is pushed in front of a moving Metrorail train and both her boyfriend and his stalker ex-girlfriend are suspected of her murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami’s club scene turns deadly when underage drinking sparks a bloody murder in a bathroom stall, Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A jury field trip to the scene of a murder flips the legal tables when the defendant ends up dead and the twelve jurors become the prime suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A “Speed Dating” night for Miami singles turns deadly for one South Beach stud who finds himself on the wrong end of a tire iron.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami Beach is evacuated for a tsunami, but the CSI team remains after discovering a bank robbery plot while investigating a seemingly random murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A string of dead bodies, found off the coast of Miami, turns out to be the work of modern-day pirates. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An innocent man is killed when someone falls on him from a balcony. The CSI team is lead into the center of a high-level sex and murder scandal.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A seemingly random carjacking turns out to be anything but when a young woman's gambling addiction becomes more than the family business can support.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A hospital emergency room shootout investigation puts the CSI team in the middle of a murder case involving the leader of a prominent street gang

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop ends in the murder of a patrolman. The CSI team must sort out a young girl's obsessive love affair in order to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A "Friction Party" at a private suite in one of the city's hotels accommodating hundreds of cruise passengers leaves a young woman dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio faces a former nemesis who escaped his grasp once before, a case of stolen identity leads to murder, the question becomes "which one did it?"

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Florida's gator and snake-infested Everglades becomes ground zero for a number of unrelated murders just as fires engulf the rare eco-system.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Florida's gator and snake-infested Everglades becomes ground zero for a number of unrelated murders just as fires engulf the rare eco-system.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI, con la ayuda de informantes locales, lucha para salvar un vecindario que está a punto de ser dominado por una violenta pandilla callejera.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI usan tecnología radical para descubrir el secreto de la mente de un hombre cuando este aparece cubierto de sangre sin recordar dónde ha estado.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando ocurre un asesinato durante una carrera de caballos, Horatio y el equipo de CSI descubren que Ryan tiene un vínculo personal con el caso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alexx Woods regresa a Miami cuando un asesino pone en peligro la vida de Calleigh y Ryan. Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI enfrentan cara a cara a un abogado defensor que puede o no estar involucrado en el encubrimiento de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando unos piratas se apoderan de un yate de lujo, el futuro de Delko como CSI se ve amenazado justo cuando su relación con Calleigh pasa al siguiente nivel.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI hace un descubrimiento impactante sobre su víctima de asesinato, mientras Horatio intenta salvar a su hijo de la conducta errática de Julia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una azafata es asesinada en vuelo, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI descubren todos los trapos sucios de los viajes en avión.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una violación de domicilio se vuelve mucho más que eso cuando Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI descubren que son el blanco de la mafia rusa.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la vida de un niño inocente está en peligro, Ryan, a la larga, se ve obligado a traicionar a Horatio Caine y al resto del equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un caso de asesinato que involucra cirugía plástica extrema conduce a Horatio Caine hasta Ron Saris, que está vivo y busca vengarse de Julia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una estrella de telerrealidad es asesinada, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI se adentran en el mundo escandaloso y sensual de un programa de televisión de citas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.desc: Un chico y una chica intentan mantener su relación estrictamente física, pero no pasa mucho tiempo antes de que aprendan que quieren algo más.

programme.desc: Cuando período de servicio en Irak llega a su fin, cuatro soldados estadounidenses se enteran de que están programados pare emprender una misión final. Una misión profética que cambiará eternamente el concepto que tenían hasta ahora de guerra.

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: Bruce Willis, Sigourney Weaver and Henry Cavill star in this pulse-pounding thriller about a man trying to save his kidnapped family.

programme.title: Shaft
programme.desc: Para detener a un asesino racista, Shaft tiene que rastrear al único testigo que puede dejarlo tras las rejas. Shaft se acerca a la par del peligro.

programme.title: Regreso al infierno
programme.desc: Cuando período de servicio en Irak llega a su fin, cuatro soldados estadounidenses se enteran de que están programados pare emprender una misión final. Una misión profética que cambiará eternamente el concepto que tenían hasta ahora de guerra.

programme.title: Un padre no tan padre

programme.title: Day of the Dead: Celebration of Life
programme.desc: Each year, the spirits of the dead visit the living in this fascinating look into this famous Mexican tradition.

programme.title: Gafas amarillas
programme.desc: Luego de una separación, Julia se muda a un frío departamento donde enfrenta los conflictos cotidianos de la soledad. Julia encuentra un nuevo comienzo cuando tiene una aventura con Darío, un atractivo mesero con ínfulas de poeta.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Ilusiones S.A.
programme.desc: Para hacer feliz a su mujer, un hombre contrata a una empresa que crea fantasías para fingir que su nieto, quien los dejó hace años, es un hombre de bien. Pero el verdadero nieto, quien es en realidad un delincuente, se aparece exigiendo dinero.

programme.title: Recién cazado

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: Terror al anochecer

programme.title: Estación zombi

programme.title: La Sombra De La Noche

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte V: un nuevo comienzo

programme.desc: Se recuenta la desaparición en 1987 de Tracy Jo Shine, residente de Houston. La investigación se enfrió hasta el 2000, cuando un 'escuadrón de casos sin resolver' se enteró de que el exnovio de la mujer, Michael Neal, se había jactado de haberla matado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de seis años corrió y se escondió cuando vio que su abuela era golpeada hasta causarle la muerte, pero el hombre la siguió, la golpeó y la agredió. Ella dijo que el agresor era su tío, quien fue condenado. Se retractó de su testimonio años después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cabecera
programme.desc: Cuando los cazadores encontraron un cráneo en un cañón de Texas, la policía encontró trozos de ropa, huesos pequeños y un mechón de cabello.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre un asesinato se ve favorecida por un requisito legal de que los bares tengan cámaras de video instaladas en las instalaciones. Video, cabello y sangre conducen al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Crimen limpio
programme.desc: Una empleada de una tintorería fue violada y asesinada en la tienda. La policía recurrió a la ciencia forense en busca de las respuestas que necesitaban.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Esta examinación del papel que juegan las autopsias en las investigaciones de asesinatos se centra en la sospechosa muerte de Virginia Ridley.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres desaparecieron y luego fueron encontradas brutalmente asesinadas, la policía se preguntó si fueron víctimas de un crimen de odio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación sobre una estudiante universitaria desaparecida lleva a la policía a descubrir que, sin que sus amigos lo supieran, vivía una extraña doble vida, asistía a la escuela de día y trabajaba como prostituta de noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los médicos quedan desconcertados cuando un niño de dos años es trasladado urgentemente al hospital con convulsiones cerebrales y dificultades para respirar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mañana, en una zona desértica en las afueras de Phoenix, un motociclista descubre el cuerpo de una joven mujer. Había sido golpeada, amarrada, estrangulada y posiblemente violada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una talentosa presentadora de noticias de televisión fue asesinada a tiros fuera de su casa; parecía ser un crimen pasional, perpetrado por un fanático obsesionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 12 de Mayo de 1994, Crystal Perry fue asesinado viciosamente en su casa en Bridgton, Maine. Michael Hutchinson, de 32 años, fue encontrado culpable del asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pista elemental
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres del mismo pueblo fueron asesinadas de la misma manera, la policía temió que un asesino en serie estuviera suelto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba practicando tiros en un hermoso día de primavera, Martin Dillon es asesinado con disparos. Su amigo sostiene que fue un extraño accidente, pero se necesitan más de 20 años para que la verdad salga a la luz.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de Leanne Tiernan, de 16 años, fue descubierto nueve meses después de su desaparición. Los científicos forenses encontraron pistas que pintaron un retrato virtual de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación sobre un brutal ataque a dos niños cerca de un estanque se basa en pruebas extraídas de las aguas turbias. Fue el primer caso en el que se utilizó evidencia de Diatomea (algas) para ubicar a un sospechoso en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la noche de Halloween de 2004, Adriane Insogna y Leslie Mazzara fueron brutalmente asesinadas en su casa de Napa, California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, April Loveless, de 4 años, fue encontrada muerta en el patio trasero de su casa en Texas. Sus padres le dijeron a la policía que fue atacada y asesinada por perros salvajes. Los investigadores no estuvieron de acuerdo.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 44 women begin the very first training camp at the new 1 billion dollar Cowboys' facility, The Star. At the First Meeting, Kelli lays down the law and makes it clear that eight women will be sent home this summer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: First, the ladies need to have the "classic look" of a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Kelli's hair and make-up transformations are legendary. The ladies are also assessed through a new state of the art fitness test, "Styku".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli media trains the rookie candidates to determine who best represents the DCC at press events. NBC news anchor, Meredith Land tests their on-camera interview skills.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Personality is critical when representing the DCC brand. Kelli takes the women on location to see how they interact during a public appearance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Katy Perry's choreographer, Nick Florez, stops by to offer some performance advice to the ladies. A day that each cheerleader never forgets. The first time they wear the DCC uniform to pose for their cameo photos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad goes on an appearance to support pop music star, Demi Lovato. The ladies learn the entrance to the famed pre-game dance. It's a make or break moment. If a woman can't learn it quickly it might be her last night.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With two suspended vets, the team must re-block their formations for their Hall Of Fame performance. New vets step up as a new point of the triangle is named. The rookie candidates try to get their footing during this never seen before rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 23 veterans travel to Canton, Ohio to perform at Jerry Jones' induction to the Pro Football Hall of Fame. All eyes are watching as the DCC perform for the NFL elite.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp winds down the pressure skyrockets. No one wants to be sent home now. The ladies start to crack under the pressure. Another one is sent home. Will this be the final cut?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli announces the official squad and the women realize the hard-fought dream of becoming a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Full of excitement and nerves, the squad prepares for their very first football game at AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of eager hopefuls -- ranging from starry-eyed rookies to experienced NFL cheerleaders -- gather at AT&T Stadium for a shot at joining the world's most famous squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 125 remaining hopefuls must nail a choreographed routine before advancing to the final rounds, and the DCC veterans reveal their plans for the future.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A former Laker Girl who survived the Las Vegas shooting chases her dream, and the women work on their solo presentations and interviews as finals approach.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The returning veterans travel to the Bahamas to shoot the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders swimsuit calendar, and the rookies feel the pressure as training camp begins.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The one-year anniversary of the school shooting is approaching and everyone’s feeling the weight of it. Not least of whom is Spinner Mason, still persona non grata.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight is the premiere of “Jay and Silent Bob Go Canadian, Eh” and with many of the students and faculty on the guest list, it’s like the whole school is gripped in movie premiere fever!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige wakes Alex up in her bed – Paige spent the night on the floor – and as the two girls awkwardly prepare for school, they try to avoid the elephant in the room. As in, that they KISSED last night. What happened?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig bursts into rehearsal with the good news – they’ve been accepted to perform at a Northern Sounds Showcase. The band is NOT so into it at first – music is Craig’s dream, not theirs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since being "saved" everything has been going Spinner's way: he's made a good friend in Friendship Club leader Linus; his relationship with Darcy has been going strong, and his recent interest in improving school life has been getting him noticed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Simpson-Nelson household is in chaos. With Snake gone and Spike totally down in the dumps, keeping the household together has fallen totally onto Emma’s shoulders.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is finally getting some control over her life. Snake and Spike are back together, she’s been running every day, and she’s barely eating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Facing the pressure of year-end exams, the furthest thing from Marco’s mind is what happened a year ago – when Dylan stomped all over his heart. Marco takes this as a sign that he’s over Dylan for good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The end of another school year finds Darcy’s faith – in her boyfriend – being put to the test. When she discovers that Spinner has a past, Darcy grapples with a harsh reality of teen romance: jealousy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Peter receives a new car for his birthday, he quickly becomes a frequent face in the street racing scene.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things heat up between Emma and Sean – and when she takes time off from Peter to consider her relationship with Sean, Peter takes action – and Sean winds up expelled from Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is happy that the racing debacle is behind them, and that Peter is finally free if you don’t count the house arrest and five hundred hours of community service.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy starts the year off with big plans, coaching the girl’s junior basketball team and he is determined to take his relationship with Ashley to the next level. But can Jimmy handle the realities of his sexual future?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter, hoping to join the Spirit Squad, links Darcy’s personal web page to his. Darcy is thrilled with all the attention and hits she gets, and even posts some racy pictures of the Spirit Squad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Darcy’s online admirers take up more and more of her time, and her relationship with Spinner suffers. As Darcy posts increasingly sexy photos of herself, she’s surprised when her favourite online fan decides to introduce himself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Career Aptitude test results come in, Spinner is less than pleased with his results, and in desperation, convinces Jimmy to go into business selling T-shirts adorned with Jimmy’s illustrations.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being released from jail, Sean finds himself sleeping on Spike & Snake’s couch. Sean is focusing on putting the last few months behind him, getting a great job and being a fantastic boyfriend to Emma.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back in town for a music festival – and Manny can’t help picking up right where they left off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie thinks all Craig’s bad behaviour is due to Manny – to help him, she’s determined to stay by his side while he’s in town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s intent on getting over Craig, and uses Liberty’s upcoming birthday as an excuse to throw a party at Emma’s house while Spike and Snake are out of town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In shock after over JT’s death, Toby turns to Liberty, convinced that his somber funeral isn’t what JT would’ve wanted. Liberty agrees, and the two grief-stricken friends plan to throw a celebratory memorial for JT at Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s parents want her to come home after the tragedy at Emma’s house – and to Emma’s surprise, Manny agrees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a spectacular panic attack during a midterm exam, Paige’s professor at Banting offers her one more chance – which comes in the form of a ton of work to be completed over the holiday weekend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With her degree in jeopardy thanks to her failing grades, and the little issue of a dramatic dorm fire, Paige develops a Banting allergy. She slinks home to Toronto with her tail between her legs – but nobody can know the truth about what happened.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has one goal: to return to her former pre-Banting glory. She’s going to get back to doing what she does best. Everything – and that includes dating. Paige surprises Spinner by asking him out. Nothing serious, just casual.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s at loose ends with Dylan gone and nothing seems exciting. He and Spinner decide a spring break road trip will break the monotony – but cash is the key.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex and her mother Emily are in trouble - Chad, Emily's boyfriend, has run up thousands of dollars in credit card debt and hasn't been paying the rent.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham searches for clues related to the existence of the Loch Ness Monster in Scotland. He also visits Australia to learn about a giant lizard called Megalania.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham sets out in search of stories about Bigfoot, a mythical ape-like creature that has been the focus of many fiction novels, movies and documentaries over the years.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham explores the English countryside to learn about mythical big cats such as the Beast of Bodmin and Beast of Exmoor.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham investigates whether the thylacine, aka Tasmanian tiger or Tasmanian wolf, have truly gone extinct. The species lived in Australia and Tasmania.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: A look at the world of the African driver ant, a violent miniature monster which kills every living thing it can pin down and slice up.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: A surprising natural history of the Grand Canyon, from dinosaurs to today.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: For thousands of years, downtown LA hid an indiscriminate killer. In one of the most surprising wildlife crime stories in the world, `Natural World' turns forensic detective to solve the mystery and unmask victims and killers.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: The world's biggest beasts have always captured the imagination, but whilst being big can have its advantages, it also comes with sizeable challenges. The Komodo dragon's huge appetite means it must take on prey ten times its weight.

programme.title: Wildlife on One
programme.desc: A look at extraordinary animals around the world, emphasising their unpredictable behaviour.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: America was once home to such fierce predators as the giant short-faced bear and the saber-toothed tiger.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: In Australia 65,000 years ago, the first human explorers face a land populated with giant lizards, killer rhino-like creatures and deadly birds.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: The Maori struggled for survival 1,000 years ago in a New Zealand populated by giant birds.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.
